title: Iterate CSV auto filter rows
author: AhmadMurtaza1

comments.author: ghost
comments.body: @Siemienik how did you resolve it? Having the same issue currently

comments.author: Siemienik
comments.body:
As far as I know, it isn't a feature design for  `eachRow`/`eachCol`.
It's just a property, that can be read by for instance in Excel.

In our logic, it exists only in 3 lines:

https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/blob/master/lib/doc/worksheet.js#L108
https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/blob/master/lib/doc/worksheet.js#L720
https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/blob/master/lib/doc/worksheet.js#L781
